prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 3 (CJXC)** 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 380 HP and 440 Nm on 98 RON fuel with a **Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbocharger** (hybrid core, billet compressor wheel, and 360° thrust bearing upgrade), paired with a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport Series intercooler** (bar-and-plate, 10-row core, 70% efficiency increase over OEM) and a **Milltek Sport 3.0-inch turbo-back exhaust system** (non-resonated, 304 stainless steel, 200-cell catalytic converter for emissions compliance)

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable, monotube dampers, 15-way rebound, 12-way compression, and **VAG-specific top mounts with spherical bearings** for the MQB platform), combined with **H&R Super Sport Springs** (25mm front, 20mm rear drop) for preload optimization, and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar** (24mm, 3-position adjustable) to eliminate understeer in high-speed cornering

Brembo GT 6-piston front brake kit (355mm two-piece rotors, **J-hook slotted**, 32mm pistons, **Ferodo DS2500 pads**) with **ATE Type 200 brake fluid** (DOT 4, 320°C boiling point) and **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines** (PTFE-lined, 4mm inner diameter) for pedal firmness and fade resistance under Nürburgring-level heat cycles
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (pre-preg carbon fiber, **MQB-specific fender flares with integrated air vents** for brake cooling, 30mm extended rear quarters) paired with a **Volk Racing TE37V 18x9.5 +38** (matte bronze, 5x112 PCD) and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (255/35 R18, semi-slick compound) for track-focused grip

OEM+ **VW Racing Line carbon fiber front splitter** (3-piece, adjustable angle, **MQB-specific mounting points**) and **Rear diffuser from 034Motorsport** (carbon fiber, **integrated brake ducting**, and **diffuser strakes** for aerodynamic stability at 120+ mph)

Recaro Sportster CS seats (carbon fiber backs, **VW-specific side airbag compatibility**, and **Schroth 6-point harnesses** for track use) with **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel** (320mm diameter, **VW MIB2 integration**, and **quick-release hub**) for direct throttle response and Nürburgring-tested ergonomics
